creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
From <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2023-October/004814.html> for 14.0-BETA5: 

> If you notice problems you can report them through the Bugzilla
> PR system or on the -stable mailing list.

<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.0R/schedule/> directs people to: 

    the public freebsd-current mailing list.

Please, which one is preferred?
